metadata.description: AI skills for generating production-quality UiPath Studio projects from natural language.

plugins.name: uipath-core
plugins.description: Build UiPath Studio projects, REFramework scaffolds, XAML workflows, and VB/C# expressions via 95 deterministic Python generators. Trigger keywords: UiPath, REFramework, XAML, RPA, Orchestrator, dispatcher, performer, queue items, project.json, Config.xlsx.

plugins.name: uipath-tasks
plugins.description: Generates UiPath Tasks workflows — Form Tasks, External Tasks, and Task Management activities for human-in-the-loop, system-in-the-loop, and recovery patterns. Plugs into uipath-core via plugin_loader.
